---
title: "Applying for HEA Fellowship in the Maths Department"
description: "Requirments for applying for AFHEA, FHEA or SFHEA in the maths department"
author: "Waleed A Ali, PHEAF"
date: 11/20/2024
draft: false
editor: source
categories:
    - HEA
---

<br>

If you are thinking of applying for an Associate Fellowship, Full Fellowship or Senior Fellowship to the HEA (known as *AHFEA*, *FHEA* and *SFHEA*), then the [following presentation](https://computingservices-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/g/personal/waaa21_bath_ac_uk/IQBmv5QsMf0dRI3mfwbF7d3mASW0NmOs9OWfAsGIk0LqO60?e=Da7ddZ) will guide you towards what you need.
